name: Sinsera Vanilla DietPi
description: Plain DietPi with your personal info pre-configured: hostname SinseraCore, timezone Australia/Sydney, locale en_AU, SSH enabled, your ed25519 public key in /root/.ssh/authorized_keys. WiFi credentials = placeholder (one line to edit on the SD before flashing). No auto-launch — boots to normal console login.
post_install_message: After flashing: 1) Open the SD card on your Mac, find /boot/dietpi.txt. 2) Edit AUTO_SETUP_NET_WIFI_SSID and AUTO_SETUP_NET_WIFI_KEY with your real WiFi credentials. 3) Save + eject. 4) Insert into Pi, power on. After ~60 s first boot, SSH in: `ssh root@SinseraCore.local` (key-based, no password needed).
